name: 流量拦截 Agent
agent_card:
{"agent_id": "gateway-agent", "name": "流量拦截 Agent", "version": "0.1.0", "role": "traffic_interceptor", "owner": "aisec", "trust_score": 100, "capabilities": [{"tool": "get_alerts", "desc": ""}, {"tool": "get_status", "desc": ""}, {"tool": "parse_request", "desc": "解析请求体，提取关键字段。"}, {"tool": "decide_action", "desc": "决策放行/拒绝。返回 {decision, reason}。

        规则（V0.4 Demo 简化）：
        1. agent_id 未注册 -> deny
        2. trust_score < 30 -> rate_limit
        3. data_sensitivity >= L3 -> soc_approval
        4. MCP tools/call 调用的工具不在 MCP_SAFE_TOOLS 中 -> soc_approval（需人工审查）
        5. 否则 allow
        "}, {"tool": "query_identity", "desc": "通过 A2A 向 soc-agent 询问 Agent 身份（实际是查 Registry）。"}, {"tool": "get_flow_stats", "desc": ""}, {"tool": "get_proxy_stats", "desc": ""}, {"tool": "parse_mcp_request", "desc": "工具方法：解析 MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 消息并返回结构化字段。

        入参 body 可为 str（已 decode）或 hex/base64（这里仅支持 str）。
        非 MCP 消息时 is_mcp=False。
        "}], "endpoints": {"a2a": "http://127.0.0.1:8002/a2a", "intercept": "http://127.0.0.1:8002/intercept", "proxy_stats": "http://127.0.0.1:8002/proxy-stats"}, "registered_at": "2026-06-15T11:04:48"}
